# MyDailyNeed

> Free developer utility tools that run entirely in your browser. No data leaves your machine — everything is processed locally. Includes JSON formatting, XML processing, text utilities, OCR image-to-text, and miscellaneous developer tools.

All tools are free, require no signup, and work offline. Data never leaves your browser. No server-side processing — 100% client-side. Built with React, Tailwind CSS, and Vite.

## JSON Tools

### JSON Formatter
- [JSON Formatter](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/json-formatter): Prettify and validate JSON with syntax highlighting and configurable indentation
- Supports 2-space, 4-space, and tab indentation
- Auto-format on paste option
- Real-time validation with error highlighting
- Copy formatted output to clipboard

### JSON Minifier
- [JSON Minifier](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/json-minifier): Remove whitespace from JSON for compact output with size savings stats
- Shows original size, minified size, and percentage saved
- Preserves data integrity while removing all unnecessary whitespace

### JSON ↔ YAML Converter
- [JSON ↔ YAML Converter](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/json-yaml): Convert between JSON and YAML formats in both directions
- Bidirectional conversion with one-click switch
- Preserves nested structures and arrays

### JSON Attribute Extractor
- [JSON Attribute Extractor](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/json-attribute-extractor): Extract specific attributes from JSON using JSONPath expressions
- Uses JSONPath syntax for powerful querying
- Supports nested objects, arrays, and wildcards
- Real-time results as you type

## XML Tools

### XML Formatter
- [XML Formatter](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/xml-formatter): Prettify and validate XML with proper indentation
- Configurable 2-space or 4-space indentation
- Handles DOCTYPE declarations
- Error detection for malformed XML

### XML Minifier
- [XML Minifier](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/xml-minifier): Strip whitespace from XML for compact output with optional comment preservation
- Option to preserve or remove comments
- Shows size savings statistics
- Handles complex nested XML structures

## Text Tools

### Base64 Encoder/Decoder
- [Base64 Encoder/Decoder](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/base64-encoder-decoder): Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 back to text
- Instant encoding and decoding
- Handles Unicode and special characters
- Copy results with one click

### URL Encoder/Decoder
- [URL Encoder/Decoder](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/url-encoder-decoder): Encode URLs for safe transmission or decode encoded URLs
- Encodes special characters for safe URL transmission
- Decodes percent-encoded strings back to readable text
- Supports full URLs and individual components

### Word Counter
- [Word Counter](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/word-counter): Count words, characters, sentences, paragraphs, lines, and reading time
- Counts words, characters (with and without spaces), sentences, paragraphs, and lines
- Calculates estimated reading time
- Real-time statistics as you type

### Case Converter
- [Case Converter](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/case-converter): Convert text between uppercase, lowercase, camelCase, snake_case, and more
- Supports: UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, CONSTANT_CASE
- One-click conversion between all formats
- Preview results in real-time

### Duplicate Finder
- [Duplicate Finder](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/duplicate-finder): Find duplicate items in a comma or newline separated list
- Supports comma-separated, newline-separated, or custom delimiter lists
- Shows count of each duplicate
- Option to show only duplicates or only unique items

### Multiline to List
- [Multiline to List](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/multiline-to-list): Convert multiline text to a comma-separated list
- Converts line-by-line text to various list formats
- Options: comma-separated, bullet list, numbered list
- Trim whitespace option

### Diff Viewer
- [Diff Viewer](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/diff-viewer): Compare two texts side by side and highlight differences
- Side-by-side comparison with highlighted changes
- Shows added, removed, and unchanged lines
- Useful for comparing code, configs, or any text

## Image Tools

### Image to Text (OCR)
- [Image to Text (OCR)](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/image-to-text): Extract text from images using OCR technology powered by Tesseract.js — runs entirely in the browser
- Supports JPEG, PNG, GIF, and WebP formats
- Shows confidence score for extracted text
- Max file size: 5MB
- All processing happens locally — images are never uploaded to any server

## Misc Tools

### Timestamp Converter
- [Timestamp Converter](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/timestamp-converter): Convert between Unix timestamps and human-readable dates
- Supports seconds and milliseconds timestamps
- Converts to multiple date formats
- Live clock showing current timestamp

### UUID Generator
- [UUID Generator](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/uuid-generator): Generate random UUID v4 identifiers with uppercase/no-dash options
- Generates RFC 4122 compliant UUID v4
- Options: uppercase, no dashes
- Generate single UUID or batch of up to 100

### Color Converter
- [Color Converter](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/color-converter): Convert colors between HEX, RGB, and HSL formats with visual preview
- Converts between HEX, RGB, and HSL
- Visual color preview
- Named color lookup (e.g., "red", "navy")
- Click-to-copy color values

### Regex Tester
- [Regex Tester](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/regex-tester): Test and validate regular expressions with live matching and match details
- Live pattern matching as you type
- Shows all matches with capture groups
- Supports global and case-insensitive flags
- Match details including indices

### JWT Decoder
- [JWT Decoder](https://mydailyneed.com/tools/jwt-decoder): Decode JSON Web Tokens to view header and payload without sending them anywhere
- Decodes header and payload sections
- Pretty-printed JSON output
- Shows token expiration status
- Tokens are decoded locally — never sent to any server

## Optional

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/mydailyneed/mydailyneed): Source code and contribution guidelines
